saints.name: Venerable and God-bearing Father Anthony the Great

troparion.text: By emulating the ways of Elias the zealot,  / and following the straight paths of the Baptist,  / O Father Anthony, you made the desert a city, /  and upheld the world by your prayers.  / Therefore, entreat Christ God that our souls be saved.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You rejected the tumults of this life and lived a life of stillness,  / emulating the Baptist in every way, most righteous one.  / Therefore, we honor you with him, Father Anthony,  / the foundation of the Fathers.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Anthony, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Anthony, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Anthony, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

Champion of Orthodoxy, teacher of purity and of true worship, / the enlightener of the universe and the adornment of hierarchs: / all-wise father Achilles, your teachings have gleamed with light upon all things. / Intercede before Christ God to save our souls.
